title: Modern Typing, Generics, and API Evolution · Traceback Repair Bay
summary: Type-check interchangeable repositories, policies, events, and domain collections in Python 3.14. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a statically checked domain API and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use Python 3.14 annotation syntax, built-in generics, unions, aliases, and forward references consistently.
Define generic classes and functions whose type parameters express a real input-output relationship.
Reason about covariance, contravariance, invariance, mutation, and substitutability in generic APIs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-oop cumulative stakeholder program."""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

steps.title: Publish the incident record
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Oop Annotation Introspection applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Inspect annotations with supported APIs while accounting for lazy evaluation, forward references, and arbitrary-code risk.
